title: Cherry Hill Chinese Christian Church
description: Cherry Hill Chinese Christian Church — a loving, multilingual community that welcomes everyone.

welcome.heading: No matter your background, there's a place for you here
welcome.body: Cherry Hill Chinese Christian Church is a loving, multilingual community. Whether you're new to Cherry Hill or looking for a spiritual home, you belong here.

expect.heading: First time visiting?
items: Come as you are — no dress code
Free parking with plenty of space
You'll be warmly greeted at the door
Services available in Mandarin, Cantonese, and English

notFound.heading: Page Not Found

welcomeAlt: Members at the Seeds of Hope gathering
visitAlt: Members posing at a church event photo booth

givingPage.heading: Giving
givingPage.body: Your generous giving supports the ministries and mission of our church. Thank you for your faithful stewardship.
givingPage.checkBody: Please make checks payable to "Cherry Hill Chinese Christian Church" and mail to:
